decision_commentary: TC-002 SPECIFIC CHECK — 7m height limit: CONFIRMED. Assumptions array includes: 'HOA height limit of 7m is taken into account for massing — 337 sqm program distributed across two stories to stay under 7m; no three-story configuration.' All required fields present: spaces (array with name, qty, size_sqm per entry), total_sqm=337, assumptions. Completeness 5: all 12 programmed spaces from seed data present with name, qty, and size_sqm — bedrooms (4×20), bathrooms (4×9), kitchen (25), dining/living (55), family room (30), office (15), pool (40), terraces (2×20), service (16). Pool and terraces included per client request. Accuracy 5: total_sqm=337 is verified by the running sum shown in assumptions: 80+36+25+55+30+15+40+40+16=337. Clarity 5: matrix is self-contained, no context needed — space types and sizes are clear. State sync 3: simulated run. Timing 5: produced before any downstream scope/cost work. Decision readiness 5: assumptions fully documented including HOA height limit, pool inclusion rationale, and arithmetic verification. No auto-fail conditions triggered.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at area-program — Celia fires at DG-03 after Marcela reviews cost-basis.
